noticia.titulo: THE OCEAN TURNS RED IN THE EPIC SHOWDOWN “THE LITTLE MERMAID VS MEGA JAWS” COMING MAY 2026
noticia.texto_resumido: This May, the deepest secrets of the abyss surface with a vengeance. Bayview Entertainment is proud to announce the upcoming release of the ultimate high-concept creature feature: The Little Mermaid vs Mega Jaws. In a world where folklore meets a biological nightmare, a fabled mermaid faces her deadliest nemesis yet.
